extracted.title: Egan Storage Conditions for 04/06/2026
extracted.description:
The following restriction will be in place on the Egan Hub Storage (Egan) system for Gas Day April 6, 2026:

Egan has restricted a portion of excess injection nominations. No increases in injections will be accepted except to comply with NAESB bump guidelines.

Customers are advised that capacity may become available as the nomination and confirmation process continues throughout the day.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative if you have any questions.
